user.title: Avocent PM3000 PDU
user.description: Add one PDU. For daisy-chained PDUs, add one entry per chain position (same host, different PDU ID).

data.name: Name
data.write_community: SNMP write community (required to switch outlets; leave empty to reuse the read community)

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the PDU. Check host, community and PDU ID, and ensure SNMP is enabled.

abort.already_configured: This PDU (host + PDU ID) is already configured.
